response.overview: It tells the story of Belalang and his father, Pak Belalang, who face various problems when Pak Belalang disguises himself as a fortune teller. Belalang, a boy who has the ability to speak with grasshoppers, is responsible for supporting his family because his father, Pak Belalang, is lazy and refuses to work since the death of his mother. Belalang gets the idea to change Pak Belalang's behavior when he accidentally discovers the village's pet animal that has been stolen. Belalang suggests that Pak Belalang disguise himself as a fortune teller.
response.title: Hikayat Pak Belalang
